title: T-015 — API: BOM version diff (GET .../boms/diff?from=&to=)
prompt: Implement GET /api/technical/items/[item_code]/boms/diff?from=:vA&to=:vB returning structured JSON diff of header, lines (added / removed / changed by component_item_id), co_products. Per §7.5 TEC-023 contract. Each line entry shows old vs new quantity, scrap_pct, manufacturing_operation_name. RED tests/api/bom-diff.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/bom-diff.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Endpoint returning structured diff between two BOM versions.
pipeline_inputs.details: Diff keyed by component_item_id (lines) and co_product_item_id (co_products). Header diff lists yield_pct, status, effective_from changes. Numeric diffs return delta and percent change.
acceptance_criteria: Given v1 has 3 lines and v2 adds one and changes a quantity, when GET /diff?from=1&to=2, then response contains added=[], changed=[], removed=[] with one entry each in changed and added.
Given v1=v2, when GET /diff, then all arrays empty.
Given non-existent version pair, when GET /diff, then 404.
test_strategy: RED tests asserting shape of changed/added/removed arrays.
risk_red_lines: Do not include private_jsonb in diff.
